subcodes.first_line: O ye discerning ones! The effulgent rays of the Compassionate Lord have shone upon those steadfast companions; mind and ear have been awakened and attuned [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای هوشیاران پرتو ایزد مهربان بر سر آن یاران زد هوش و گوش بیدار شد و همراز
subcodes.subjects: @mysteries and their discovery; the mystical vision, @praise and encouragement
